top_signals.title: Asia week ahead: Korea rate call, data from China and India
top_signals.summary: South Korea: BoK to raise rates 25bps amid firming inflation South Korea’s inflation pressures have broadened and firmed. With growth holding up and inflation on a higher trajectory, the Bank of Korea is poised to begin a new tightening cycle on Thursday. We expect the BoK to raise rates by 25bp. India: Lower oil to ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: China tells refiners to keep fuel output high as Iran conflict threatens supply
top_signals.summary: China has instructed some of its largest refiners to maintain high fuel production as renewed fighting between Iran and the United States raises the risk of disruptions to crude shipments through the Persian Gulf, according to a Bloomberg News report on Saturday. The move underscores Beijing’s efforts to safeguard domestic fuel supplies as geopolitical tensions ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
